content_body:
Over 40 years of service, Trailer Drive-In is one of Blue Ridge’s favorite throwback burger joints. Serving breakfast and lunch daily from 5:30 am to 4:00 pm, they’ve got country classics for all. 

Giant scratch biscuits - as big as a softball! - for biscuits and gravy or bacon, egg, and cheese biscuits. Southern-style sweet tea to accompany a slaw dog or classic cheeseburger topped off with housemate milkshakes and homemade chicken tenders. If you want a good old-fashioned burger and fries, this is the go-to location. 

A cash-only establishment providing a nice outside seating area with picnic tables, good food, good portions, and great staff. Come check them out at 2691 E First St, Blue Ridge, GA.
title: Trailer Drive-In
